title: selaginella dasyloma
intro: Selaginella dasyloma, also known as Peacock's Spikemoss or Peacock Spikemoss, is a small, low-growing, evergreen plant species belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its ability to alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella dasyloma include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Selaginella dasyloma is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
